name: Ugly Putters Indoor Golf & Event Center
about: Ugly Putters Indoor Golf & Event Center is an indoor golf facility equipped with four Golfzon simulators, offering year-round golf access regardless of weather conditions. The venue provides a relaxed, country club-like atmosphere without the traditional country club price point, featuring a full menu of food and drinks. It caters to a wide range of golfers, from beginners to experienced players, with over 190 virtual courses available and support for groups up to six people per bay.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 190 virtual golf courses, including exclusive PGA and TPC courses
Four award-winning Golfzon simulators with highly accurate and responsive technology
Relaxed, inclusive atmosphere offering a country club experience at an affordable price
Support for groups up to six players per bay, allowing for social and competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a menu of food options
Full bar with tempting cocktails available

simulator_hardware.notes: Award-winning indoor golf simulator; named Golf Digest 2019 'Best Golf Simulator/Luxury'

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify whether club rentals are available, but it's common for indoor facilities to provide clubs or allow players to bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has its own kitchen and full bar, suggesting outside food and drinks may not be permitted, though this is not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: One hour generally equates to 18 holes per person, so a game with 4 people would typically take about 4 hours to complete.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility welcomes newbies and appears to have a family-friendly atmosphere with food options and activities suitable for various age groups.
